sentences.english: My favorite country is Australia. I've been there and I absolutely loved it. The people are so friendly and welcoming.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋아하는 나라는 호주예요. 가봤는데 정말 좋았어요. 사람들이 아주 친절하고 환대해줘요.

sentences.english: I stayed in Melbourne, which is a vibrant city with lots of culture, good food, and great weather. The beaches are beautiful too. I could live there.
sentences.korean: 멜번에 머물렀는데, 문화가 풍부하고 음식이 맛있고 날씨 좋은 활기찬 도시예요. 해변도 아름다워요.

sentences.english: New Zealand is my favorite country. I went there for a vacation and I was blown away by the natural beauty. The mountains, the fjords, the forests — everything is stunning.
sentences.korean: 뉴질랜드가 가장 좋아하는 나라예요. 휴가로 갔는데 자연의 아름다움에 감탄했어요. 산이 정말 멋져요.

sentences.english: The people are really nice too. Very laid-back and friendly. I would definitely go back.
sentences.korean: 사람들도 정말 좋아요. 아주 여유롭고 친절해요. 꼭 다시 가고 싶어요.

sentences.english: I'd say Hungary. I went to Budapest and had an amazing time. The architecture is beautiful, the food is delicious, and it's very affordable. The thermal baths are incredible — you can relax in these ancient hot springs while enjoying the city views.
sentences.korean: 헝가리요. 부다페스트에 갔는데 정말 놀라운 시간을 보냈어요. 건축이 아름답고, 음식이 맛있고, 물가도 정말 저렴해요.

sentences.english: Thailand is my favorite. I went there a few years ago and had the best time. The culture is fascinating, the food is phenomenal, and it's very affordable. The people are incredibly kind and welcoming.
sentences.korean: 태국이 가장 좋아하는 나라예요. 몇 년 전에 갔는데 최고의 시간을 보냈어요. 문화가 매력적이고 음식이 경이로워요.

sentences.english: Bangkok is chaotic but exciting, and then you have these quiet, peaceful islands.
sentences.korean: 방콕은 혼란스럽지만 흥미롭고, 조용하고 평화로운 섬들도 있어요.

sentences.english: Lebanon is my favorite country because it's my home country. But if I'm talking about another country, I really love Lebanon because of the food, the culture, and the hospitality of the people.
sentences.korean: 레바논이 가장 좋아하는 나라예요, 고국이니까요. 다른 나라를 말한다면, 정말 좋아해요.

sentences.english: I encourage everyone to visit because it's a beautiful place.
My favorite country is France. I love the culture, the food, the wine. Paris is beautiful, but I also love the countryside — the vineyards, the lavender fields.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋아하는 나라는 프랑스예요. 문화, 음식, 와인을 좋아하고요. 파리가 아름답지만 시골도 좋아해요.

sentences.english: The French people can be a bit standoffish, but once you get to know them, they're wonderful.
sentences.korean: 프랑스 사람들은 좀 쌀쌀할 수 있지만, 알고 나면 훌륭해요.

quiz.question: What does '멋진, 놀라운' mean in English?
